sentences.sentence: Telecommuting, Internet shopping and online meetings may save energy as compared with in-person alternatives, but as the digital age moves on, its green reputation is turning a lot browner.
sentences.translation: 与面对面进行的替代方式相比，远程办公、网上购物和线上会议或许能够节能；但随着数字时代不断发展，它的绿色声誉正变得越来越不环保。

structure.text: Telecommuting, Internet shopping and online meetings may save energy
as compared with in-person alternatives
but as the digital age moves on
its green reputation is turning a lot browner

difficult_points: but 连接前后相反的判断，as 引导时间从句，表示数字时代继续发展。
its 指 the digital age；browner 与 green 形成颜色隐喻，意为实际环保程度下降。

sentences.sentence: E-mailing, number crunching and Web searches in the U.S. consumed as much as 61 billion kilowatt-hours last year, or 1.5 per cent of the nation's electricity-half of which comes from coal.
sentences.translation: 去年，美国的电子邮件处理、数字运算和网络搜索消耗了多达610亿千瓦时的电力，相当于全国用电量的1.5%，而其中一半的电力来自煤炭。

structure.text: E-mailing, number crunching and Web searches in the U.S.
consumed as much as 61 billion kilowatt-hours last year
or 1.5 per cent of the nation's electricity
half of which comes from coal

difficult_points: or 后面的数量不是二选一，而是对61 billion kilowatt-hours的换算说明。
half of which 是非限制性定语从句，which 指 the nation's electricity；原文用连字符连接。

sentences.sentence: In 2005 the computers of the world ate up 123 billion kilowatt-hours of energy, a number that will double by 2010 if present trends continue, according to Jonathan Koomey, a staff scientist at Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory.
sentences.translation: 劳伦斯伯克利国家实验室工作人员乔纳森·库米指出，2005年全球计算机消耗了1230亿千瓦时的能源；如果当前趋势持续，这一数字到2010年将翻一番。

structure.text: In 2005 the computers of the world ate up 123 billion kilowatt-hours of energy
a number that will double by 2010 if present trends continue
that will double by 2010
according to Jonathan Koomey, a staff scientist at Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory

difficult_points: a number 是对前述能耗数字的同位说明，that 定语从句修饰它。
if present trends continue 是条件从句，限定数字翻倍的前提。

sentences.sentence: As a result, the power bill to run a computer over its lifetime will surpass the cost of buying the machine in the first place giving Internet and computer companies a business reason to cut energy costs, as well as an environmental one.
sentences.translation: 因此，一台计算机整个使用寿命期间的电费将超过最初购买机器的成本，这使互联网和计算机公司不仅出于环保考虑，也有了降低能耗成本的商业理由。

structure.text: As a result
the power bill to run a computer over its lifetime will surpass the cost of buying the machine in the first place
giving Internet and computer companies a business reason to cut energy costs, as well as an environmental one

difficult_points: to run a computer 修饰 power bill，over its lifetime 表示计算机整个寿命期。
giving... 是现在分词结果状语；原文在 place 与 giving 之间缺少逗号。
an environmental one 中 one 替代 reason。

sentences.sentence: One of the biggest energy sinks comes not from the computers themselves but from the air-conditioning needed to keep them from overheating.
sentences.translation: 最大的耗能来源之一并非计算机本身，而是防止计算机过热所需的空调系统。

structure.text: One of the biggest energy sinks
comes not from the computers themselves but from the air-conditioning
needed to keep them from overheating

difficult_points: not from...but from... 对比真正的能耗来源。
needed... 是过去分词修饰 air-conditioning；them 指 computers。

sentences.sentence: For every kilowatt-hour of energy used for computing in a data centre, another kilowatt-hour is required to cool the furnace-like racks of servers.
sentences.translation: 数据中心每用一千瓦时电进行运算，就还需要另一千瓦时电来冷却像火炉一样发热的服务器机架。

structure.text: For every kilowatt-hour of energy used for computing in a data centre
another kilowatt-hour is required
to cool the furnace-like racks of servers

difficult_points: used for computing 是过去分词修饰 energy。
For every...another... 表达一比一的额外能耗关系。

sentences.sentence: For Internet giant Google, this reality has driven efforts such as the installation of a solar array that can provide 30 per cent of the peak power needs of its Mountain View, Calif., headquarters as well as increased purchases of renewable energy.
sentences.translation: 对互联网巨头谷歌而言，这一现实推动了多项行动，例如安装可满足其加州山景城总部30%峰值用电需求的太阳能阵列，以及增加可再生能源采购。

structure.text: For Internet giant Google
this reality has driven efforts
such as the installation of a solar array that can provide 30 per cent of the peak power needs of its Mountain View, Calif., headquarters as well as increased purchases of renewable energy
that can provide 30 per cent of the peak power needs of its Mountain View, Calif., headquarters

difficult_points: this reality 回指数据中心计算与冷却造成的巨大能耗。
that 修饰 solar array；as well as 并列 installation 与 increased purchases 两项行动。

sentences.sentence: But to deliver Web pages within seconds, the firm must maintain hundreds of thousands of computer servers in cavernous buildings.
sentences.translation: 但为了在数秒内传送网页，该公司必须在洞穴般巨大的建筑中维护数十万台计算机服务器。

structure.text: But to deliver Web pages within seconds
the firm must maintain hundreds of thousands of computer servers
in cavernous buildings

difficult_points: to deliver... 是目的状语，说明维护大量服务器的原因。
cavernous 用洞穴作比，强调建筑内部空间极其庞大。

sentences.sentence: "It's a good thing to worry about server energy efficiency," remarks Google's green energy czar Bill Weihl.
sentences.translation: “关注服务器的能源效率是一件好事，”谷歌绿色能源主管比尔·韦尔说道。

structure.text: It's a good thing
to worry about server energy efficiency
remarks Google's green energy czar Bill Weihl

difficult_points: 引语中 It 是形式主语，to worry about... 才是真正主语。
remarks 位于引语之后，主语是 Google's green energy czar Bill Weihl。

sentences.sentence: "We are actively working to maximize the efficiency of our data centres, which account for most of the energy Google consumes worldwide."
sentences.translation: “我们正积极努力使数据中心的效率最大化，而数据中心占谷歌全球能源消耗的大部分。”

structure.text: We are actively working to maximize the efficiency of our data centres
which account for most of the energy Google consumes worldwide
Google consumes worldwide

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，指 our data centres。
energy 后省略关系代词 that，Google consumes worldwide 修饰 energy。

sentences.sentence: Google will funnel some of its profits into a new effort, dubbed RE
sentences.translation: 谷歌将把部分利润投入一项名为“RE”的新计划。

structure.text: Google will funnel some of its profits into a new effort
dubbed RE

difficult_points: funnel...into... 比喻把资金集中投入某个项目。
dubbed RE 是过去分词修饰 effort；原文在 RE 处突然结束，没有句末标点或后续说明，属于截断文本。

sentences.sentence: In the meantime, the industry as a whole has employed a few tricks to save watts.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，整个行业也采用了一些办法来节省电力。

structure.text: In the meantime
the industry as a whole has employed a few tricks
to save watts

difficult_points: as a whole 修饰 the industry，表示把行业视为一个整体。
to save watts 是目的状语；watts 在此借指减少电力消耗。

sentences.sentence: Efforts include cutting down on the number of transformations the electricity itself must undergo before achieving the correct operating voltage; rearranging the stacks of servers and the mechanics of their cooling; and using software to create multiple "virtual" computers, rather than having to deploy several real ones.
sentences.translation: 这些措施包括：减少电力在达到正确工作电压前必须经历的转换次数；重新安排服务器机架及其冷却机制；以及利用软件创建多个“虚拟”计算机，而不必部署多台实体机。

structure.text: Efforts include
cutting down on the number of transformations the electricity itself must undergo before achieving the correct operating voltage
rearranging the stacks of servers and the mechanics of their cooling
and using software to create multiple "virtual" computers, rather than having to deploy several real ones

difficult_points: include 后接三个由分号分隔的并列动名词短语。
transformations 后省略关系代词 that，the electricity itself must undergo... 修饰它。
rather than 对比创建虚拟机与部署多台实体机，ones 指 computers。

sentences.sentence: Such virtualization has allowed computer maker Hewlett-Packard to consolidate 86 data centers spread throughout the world to just three, with three backups, says Pat Tiernan, the firm's vice president of social and environmental responsibility.
sentences.translation: 惠普公司负责社会与环境责任的副总裁帕特·蒂尔南表示，这种虚拟化使惠普能够把分布于全球的86个数据中心整合为仅3个，并另设3个备份中心。

structure.text: Such virtualization has allowed computer maker Hewlett-Packard to consolidate 86 data centers spread throughout the world to just three, with three backups
spread throughout the world
says Pat Tiernan, the firm's vice president of social and environmental responsibility

difficult_points: allow...to... 表示使惠普能够整合数据中心，spread... 修饰 86 data centers。
says... 是后置报道语；the firm's vice president... 与 Pat Tiernan 构成同位关系。

sentences.sentence: The industry is also tackling the energy issue at the computer-chip level.
sentences.translation: 该行业也在计算机芯片层面着手解决能源问题。

structure.text: The industry
is also tackling the energy issue
at the computer-chip level

difficult_points: is tackling 使用现在进行时，强调行业正在采取行动。
at the computer-chip level 限定解决问题所处的技术层面。

sentences.sentence: With every doubling of processing power in recent years has come a doubling in power consumption.
sentences.translation: 近年来，处理能力每提高一倍，耗电量也随之增加一倍。

structure.text: With every doubling of processing power in recent years
has come
a doubling in power consumption

difficult_points: 地点／伴随成分置于句首触发完全倒装，真正主语是 a doubling in power consumption。
两个 doubling 分别指处理能力和耗电量翻倍，强调同步增长。

sentences.sentence: But to save energy, chipmakers such as Intel and AMD have shifted to so-called multicore technology, which packs multiple processors into one circuit rather than separating them."When we moved to multicore-away from a linear focus on megahertz and gigahertz— and throttled down microprocessors, the energy savings were pretty substantial," says Allyson Klein, Intel's marketing manager for its Ecotech Initiative.
sentences.translation: 但为了节能，英特尔和AMD等芯片制造商已经转向所谓的多核技术：它把多个处理器封装进一个电路，而不是将它们分开。“当我们转向多核技术——摆脱只关注兆赫和吉赫的线性思路——并降低微处理器运行速度时，节能效果相当显著，”英特尔生态技术计划营销经理艾莉森·克莱因说。

structure.text: chipmakers such as Intel and AMD have shifted to so-called multicore technology
which packs multiple processors into one circuit rather than separating them
When we moved to multicore-away from a linear focus on megahertz and gigahertz— and throttled down microprocessors
the energy savings were pretty substantial

difficult_points: which 指 multicore technology，rather than 对比封装到同一电路与分别放置。
原文在 them. 与下一句开引号之间没有空格，因此为保持段落逐字重组，此处作为一个记录保留。
引语中的 multicore-away 连字符排版异常，应理解为“转向多核、摆脱线性频率追求”；says... 是后置报道语。

sentences.sentence: Chipmakers continue to shrink circuits on the nanoscale as well, which means a chip needs less electricity" to deliver the same performance, she adds.
sentences.translation: 她补充说，芯片制造商也在继续以纳米尺度缩小电路，这意味着芯片只需更少电力就能达到相同性能。

structure.text: Chipmakers continue to shrink circuits on the nanoscale as well
which means a chip needs less electricity" to deliver the same performance
she adds

difficult_points: which 指前面整个“缩小电路”的事实，并说明其结果。
to deliver... 表示更少电力所实现的功能；原文 electricity 后有一个位置异常且未配对的引号。

sentences.sentence: With such chips, more personal computers will meet various efficiency standards, such as Energy Star compliance (which mandates that a desktop consume no more than 65 watts).
sentences.translation: 采用这类芯片后，更多个人电脑将达到各种能效标准，例如“能源之星”标准（该标准规定台式机功耗不得超过65瓦）。

structure.text: With such chips
more personal computers will meet various efficiency standards
such as Energy Star compliance
which mandates that a desktop consume no more than 65 watts

difficult_points: With such chips 表示具备这些芯片后的条件。
which 指 Energy Star compliance；mandates 后 that 从句使用原形 consume，属于要求类虚拟语气。

sentences.sentence: The federal government, led by agencies such as NASA and the Department of Defense may soon require all their purchases to meet the Electronic Product Environmental Assessment Tool standard.
sentences.translation: 在美国国家航空航天局和国防部等机构带动下，联邦政府可能很快要求其所有采购产品都符合电子产品环境评估工具标准。

structure.text: The federal government
led by agencies such as NASA and the Department of Defense
may soon require all their purchases to meet the Electronic Product Environmental Assessment Tool standard

difficult_points: led by... 是过去分词插入成分，修饰 federal government；原文在 Defense 后缺少配对逗号。
require...to meet... 表示要求采购产品达到标准；their 在形式上与单数 government 不一致。

sentences.sentence: And Google, Intel and others have formed the Climate Savers Computing Initiative, an effort to cut power consumption from all computers by 50 per cent by 2010.
sentences.translation: 谷歌、英特尔等公司还发起了“气候拯救者计算计划”，目标是到2010年把所有计算机的耗电量削减50%。

structure.text: Google, Intel and others
have formed the Climate Savers Computing Initiative
an effort to cut power consumption from all computers by 50 per cent by 2010

difficult_points: an effort... 是 Climate Savers Computing Initiative 的同位说明。
两个 by 含义不同：by 50 per cent 表示幅度，by 2010 表示截止时间。

sentences.sentence: Sleep modes and other power management tools built into most operating systems can offer savings today.
sentences.translation: 大多数操作系统内置的睡眠模式及其他电源管理工具如今就能帮助节能。

structure.text: Sleep modes and other power management tools
built into most operating systems
can offer savings today

difficult_points: built into... 是过去分词修饰 tools，也可语意上涵盖 sleep modes。
savings 在此不是金钱储蓄，而是能源节省。

sentences.sentence: Yet about 90 per cent of computers do not have such settings enabled, according to Klein.
sentences.translation: 然而，克莱因称，约90%的计算机并未启用这些设置。

structure.text: Yet
about 90 per cent of computers do not have such settings enabled
according to Klein

difficult_points: have such settings enabled 是 have + 宾语 + 过去分词，表示让设置处于启用状态。
such settings 回指睡眠模式和电源管理工具的相关设置。

sentences.sentence: Properly activated, they would prevent a computer from leading to the emission of thousands of kilograms of carbon dioxide from power plants every year.
sentences.translation: 如果正确启用，这些设置每年可避免一台计算机间接导致发电厂排放数千千克二氧化碳。

structure.text: Properly activated
they would prevent a computer from leading to the emission of thousands of kilograms of carbon dioxide from power plants every year

difficult_points: Properly activated 是省略 they are 的条件从句，they 指这些节能设置。
prevent...from leading to... 表示阻止计算机造成排放；from power plants 修饰 emission 的来源。

sentences.sentence: But if powering down or unplugging the computer (the only way it uses zero power) is not an option, then perhaps the most environmentally friendly use of all those wasted computing cycles is in helping to model climate change.
sentences.translation: 但如果关闭或拔掉计算机电源——这是让它完全不耗电的唯一办法——不可行，那么对那些被浪费的运算周期最环保的利用方式，也许就是帮助建立气候变化模型。

structure.text: if powering down or unplugging the computer (the only way it uses zero power) is not an option
then perhaps the most environmentally friendly use of all those wasted computing cycles
is in helping to model climate change

difficult_points: powering down 与 unplugging 是并列动名词，在 if 从句中共同作主语。
括号说明完全断电是实现 zero power 的唯一方式，其中 way 后省略关系词。
computing cycles 指计算机可用于运算的处理资源。

sentences.sentence: The University of Oxford's ClimatePrediction.net offers an opportunity to at least predict the consequences of all that coal burning.
sentences.translation: 牛津大学的 ClimatePrediction.net 至少提供了一个预测大量燃煤后果的机会。

structure.text: The University of Oxford's ClimatePrediction.net
offers an opportunity
to at least predict the consequences of all that coal burning

difficult_points: to predict... 修饰 opportunity，说明这一机会可用于做什么。
all that coal burning 指前文为计算机供电而进行的大量燃煤发电。

sentences.sentence: CO2 Stats is a free tool that can be embedded into any Website to calculate the carbon dioxide emissions associated with using it.
sentences.translation: CO2 Stats 是一种可嵌入任何网站的免费工具，用来计算使用该网站所产生的二氧化碳排放。

structure.text: CO2 Stats is a free tool
that can be embedded into any Website
to calculate the carbon dioxide emissions associated with using it

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句修饰 tool；to calculate... 表示嵌入工具的目的。
associated with using it 是过去分词修饰 emissions，it 按语境指装有工具的网站。

sentences.sentence: That estimate is based on an assumption of 300 watts of power consumed by the personal computer, network and server involved- or 16.5 milligrams of CO2 emitted every second of use.
sentences.translation: 该估算基于如下假设：相关个人电脑、网络和服务器共消耗300瓦电力，也就是每使用一秒排放16.5毫克二氧化碳。

structure.text: That estimate is based on an assumption of 300 watts of power
consumed by the personal computer, network and server involved
or 16.5 milligrams of CO2 emitted every second of use

difficult_points: consumed by... 修饰 power，involved 是过去分词后置修饰三类设备。
or 在此引出同一假设换算后的排放速率；原文 involved 后用连字符连接。

expressions.text: be based on an assumption of

sentences.sentence: "The typical carbon footprint is roughly equivalent to 1.5 people breathing," says physicist Alexander Wissner-Gross of Harvard University, who co-created the Web tool.
sentences.translation: “一个典型网站的碳足迹大致相当于1.5个人呼吸产生的排放，”共同开发该网络工具的哈佛大学物理学家亚历山大·维斯纳-格罗斯说。

structure.text: The typical carbon footprint is roughly equivalent to 1.5 people breathing
says physicist Alexander Wissner-Gross of Harvard University
who co-created the Web tool

difficult_points: 1.5 people breathing 是名词加现在分词结构，用人的呼吸作碳排放类比。
who 引导非限制性定语从句，指 Alexander Wissner-Gross。
